updatedBy: Claude AI — honesty recalibration + sidebar reorg + premium UI polish

metricsExplainer.overallPercent: Phase-weighted average across all 10 phases (full MAXONS vision). Phases 7-10 are queued/active so honest total is ~60%.
metricsExplainer.launchReadinessPercent: Narrower metric — how ready Phases 1-6 are for the launch-first scope. Email/gdrive code landed but not activated (deps install step pending), UI polish in flight, so 85% not 100%.
metricsExplainer.math: (100+100+100+100+100+85+5+0+0+0)/10 = 59; rounded to 60. Launch readiness = average of phases 1-6 = 97.5, minus penalties for unactivated email (−5) and unactivated gdrive (−4) + UI polish in flight (−3) = 85.

ciState.note: 2026-04-24 05:30Z: First Deploy Supabase Edge Functions run succeeded (d6c3a1f). Full pipeline live: push to supabase/functions/** now auto-deploys all 5 edge fns.

secret_status.SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN: present (added 2026-04-24 via github-actions-deploy token, never expires)

emailPipeline.note: Edge fn (Deno) → SMTP hard-timeout 8s → fails fast → queues into email_queue. Node.js runner flushes every 5 min via nodemailer (Office 365 basic auth — same creds imap-reader.js uses). Deno Deploy raw TCP to smtp.office365.com was the 502 root cause.

architecture.cron: runner.js runs flushOnce() every 5 min + retries max 5x per row

emailPipeline.live_verification_pending: Run `npm run email:flush` locally OR wait for autonomous runner cron to tick
emailPipeline.activation: User runs `npm install nodemailer` then the autonomous runner picks up the 5-min flusher cron automatically. Edge fn already live with SMTP timeout (1229005 deployed green).
emailPipeline.ci_note: Deps kept out of package.json so `npm ci` stays valid; runner lazy-imports. Not a workaround — this is the clean design for optional autonomous-runner features.

gdrive.note: Google Drive service-account storage wired for ABC PDF archival + daily DB backups.

folders.backups: falls back to position_reports folder under Backups_YYYY-MM-DD/ subfolder if GDRIVE_BACKUPS_FOLDER_ID not set

runner_hooks: archiveABCReports() — after STEP 5 of autonomous cycle
gdrive.share_prerequisite: Service-account email must be Editor on the Drive folder(s) — check People with access in Drive UI
gdrive.activation: User runs `npm install googleapis` + shares folder 1O2xsv... with service account email, then runner archives + daily-backs-up automatically.
gdrive.ci_note: Same lazy-load pattern. gdrive.js and gdrive-uploader.js ship in the repo but deps install is deferred to runner host.

launchFindings.issue: 7 FadeIn sections stuck at opacity-0 — content below hero invisible for real visitors

launchFindings.issue: Admin (MAXONS team tier) saw the generic 'Welcome' persona banner — PersonaBanner map missing admin/maxons_team/sales/seller entries
Market-signal YoY compared latest year vs SUM of all-prior years (not just the prior year). Made every market show -87% YoY / Avoid. Logic bug.
Duplicate crop-year chips: '2016/17' + '2016/2017' both present because seed/backfill/parser wrote the field in different formats. Confusing UI; same underlying year counted twice in filters.

launchFindings.issue: Monthly Export-vs-Domestic bars only render for Aug + Oct; other months empty. Symptom of sparse modeled data for certain crop years. Non-critical — honest view of what's in DB.

launchFindings.issue: Thought Bearing Acreage lines weren't rendering — was a scroll-position screenshot artifact. Lines render correctly (green/amber/blue dashed for Bearing/Non-Bearing/Total). No action needed.
Pluralization glitch in contact-type summary: '1 logisticss' and '1 brokers' (double-s / singular-count-plural-noun). UNCOUNTABLE list + count===1 singular logic added.
Zyra header said '3 AI Models Active' + panel said '4 AI Systems Working Together' — both overstated (only Claude + ElevenLabs are live; GPT + Gemini are Phase 8 roadmap).
launchFindings.note: Split '3 models' → honest '1 AI Model Active (Claude) · GPT + Gemini council on roadmap'; panel cards now tagged LIVE vs ROADMAP per provider.

launchFindings.issue: User flagged: Zyra AI system isn't broken out on /map — no visible plan + progress for bubble, trainer, chat, WhatsApp, prescriptions. Was a single 'Zyra AI Agent' entry with generic feature list.
launchFindings.note: Split into 5 first-class systems: zyra-bubble, zyra-full-page, zyra-trainer, zyra-whatsapp, zyra-prescriptions. Each with real feature done/todo breakdown.

launchFindings.issue: All 4 WhatsApp edge functions returning 503 BOOT_ERROR — bundles were missing on Supabase edge storage despite metadata rows existing. Root cause: deploy corruption at some point during earlier session.
launchFindings.note: User ran supabase CLI locally: supabase functions deploy whatsapp-{login,send,verify,webhook} --project-ref eywsfmixzrdfcywmdaaw. All 4 fns now return HTTP 200 on valid calls. Verified via curl.

Walk every page post-scraper-fix, confirm data binds, confirm filters work, confirm shared Card component renders premium.

V1 had /admin/widget-workshop: split-view with widget picker (left), Before↔After live preview (center), Zyra chat+voice panel (right), Save Draft/Publish/Revert + Version History. Backed by widget_configs table, useWidgetConfig hook, Zyra propose_widget_edit tool, auto data-gap detection. V2 has ZERO of this shipped — only the Card primitive (landed this pass) as the visual foundation. Steps to port: (a) Card primitive ✅ DONE; (b) widget_configs migration + RLS (admin rw, authenticated read published); (c) useWidgetConfig hook merging published DB config over hardcoded defaults; (d) retrofit 6 priority widgets (Dashboard share pie, sentiment, export bar, price trend, forecast, supply trend) to consume config; (e) /admin/widget-workshop route with 3-column split view + AdminRoute guard; (f) extend Zyra with propose_widget_edit tool; (g) Revert + Version History drawer.
blockers: Card primitive in place, but widget_configs table + hook + route are all missing
order.priority: post-launch — but foundational for Zyra priority since Workshop IS a Zyra surface

priorityQueue.executionRule: No skipping. Verify each task via SQL count + UI screenshot + curl before marking complete. Record each verification in currentWork.description.

(1) /map honesty: overallPercent 99→60 (honest 10-phase average 59.5→60); Phase 6 95→85 since email+gdrive code landed but user hasn't activated (`npm install nodemailer googleapis`); new launchReadinessPercent=85 separates launch-scope from full-vision metric; metricsExplainer block added so /map visitors see the math. Uppercase section labels, priority-sort within section only, active-state glow dot, scroll overflow on long lists. (3) Premium Card component: src/components/Card.jsx with Card.Stat + Card.Section subexports, glass-dark surface with top-highlight gradient, 6 tone variants (default/green/amber/red/blue/indigo/flush), 5 padding sizes. Now the user's new directive kicks in: scrapers first with extensive verification, then Zyra priority, then Destinations display fix, then Reports completeness. See priorityQueue above.

markedForLater.title: Offers: multi-product mode + Strata ref + freight/insurance
markedForLater.description: Redesign Offers tab to (1) build multi-product offers from product file, (2) evaluate against Strata market reference price, (3) attach freight + insurance line items, (4) streamlined UI for applying offers end-to-end.
markedForLater.approach: New OfferBuilder component + offer_items child table + freight_terms + margin-vs-Strata comparator. Reuses existing product catalog + strata_prices table.
markedForLater.notes: MVP shipped: multi-product line items via items[] state, live Strata price lookup from strata_prices table, freight + insurance as offer-level fields stored in metadata JSONB. Backward compatible with single-product offers. Full schema migration to offer_items child table + dedicated OfferBuilder component deferred to post-launch.

markedForLater.title: F6: Team user management — admin CRUD + team verify panel + RLS
markedForLater.description: Admins get all 11 role dropdowns + Make-team/Verified-buyer/Make-admin presets in add-user and per-row editors. Team members (non-admin) get a dedicated Verify Users panel that can only promote registered→verified, with RLS + trigger enforcing the column-level guard at the DB layer.

markedForLater.title: V1 team users → V2 role upgrade (one-time SQL)
markedForLater.description: V1 user migration defaulted everyone to role='buyer'. Any V1 admins/team members remain at buyer-tier until promoted. Needs the V1 team-user list (from ../Cropsintel/ handoff docs or user) + a one-shot UPDATE user_profiles SET role=, access_tier= WHERE email IN (...) run through the Supabase SQL editor or service-role script.
markedForLater.approach: After F6 UI ships, admin can flip promoted users one-by-one via Settings → User Management using the new 'Make team' preset button. For bulk, craft a migration script once the V1 list is available.

markedForLater.title: ABC position reports — fill missing months for past crop years
markedForLater.notes: Audit 2026-04-24: 106 rows across 11 crop years. Gaps: 2015/16 missing months 8-12; 2016/17 missing months 4 and 12; 2019/20 missing months 7, 8, 10; 2020/21 missing 9 months (only 3 rows present — biggest hole); 2021/22 missing month 2; 2022/23 missing month 8; 2023/24 missing month 10. 2025/26 is in-progress and expected to grow naturally. Trigger via workflow-dispatch of auto-scrape.yml with ABC_SCRAPE_LIMIT=200 (or run locally once service-role key is available).
markedForLater.acceptance: Target 128 rows when all past-year gaps are filled; sidebar claim updates automatically.

phases.name: Honesty + Completion Sprint
phases.summary: 20+ phases shipped. Honesty pass, /map command center, scraper fixes, Variety/Forecast/County/Almanac Intelligence, FilterBar kit + 4 page retrofits, Destinations/Pricing/News compare modes, Pricing 4th view, CRM dual-channel invite + tier filter + admin Verify User, Persona Banner MVP, V1 Returning-User Popup, scraper default mode → 'all'. Email pipeline (nodemailer flusher) + Google Drive storage (archive + backups) CODE LANDED but awaiting user `npm install nodemailer googleapis` + Drive-folder share to activate. UI polish (sidebar reorg + shared Card component + premium page treatment) in flight.

phases.name: Vision Alignment (from April 16 Handoff)
phases.summary: User shared full vision doc 2026-04-24 night. New first-class scope: BRM, SRM, Information Walls (DB+API), Multi-Portal Frontend, Trade Lifecycle + margin engine, ADELA orchestrator, ATLAS self-developing brain, Verified Social Network, commodity-agnostic schema. Non-negotiables: never hardcode 'almonds', always info-wall at DB+API, always audit-log, always multi-commodity-ready. Night-shift plan 10 blocks queued; nightShiftPlan object above.

phases.name: Relationship Spine (CRM+BRM+SRM with info walls)
phases.summary: Three distinct relationship graphs with strict information walls at DB (Postgres RLS) + API middleware + portal scoping. Customer sees only their pricing; broker sees only market intel + margin targets; supplier sees only own shipments + demand signals.

phases.name: Trade Lifecycle Execution
phases.summary: Offer → margin engine → customer view → request to buy (self-serve or assisted) → sales verification → WhatsApp contract link → interactive e-sign → fulfillment tracking. Zyra orchestrates lifecycle end-to-end.

phases.name: Atlas Autonomous Self-Development
phases.summary: Atlas reads own plan, AI council debates, admin approves (WhatsApp video + OTP), ships change. Self-monitoring + self-healing loop. Founder-only admin gate.

systems.name: Zyra — Trainer & Learning Loop
systems.description: Train Zyra with domain corrections, approved facts, and stakeholder-specific knowledge. Every correction feeds back so Zyra gets smarter over time.

features.name: Trainer UI: thumb-up / thumb-down on any Zyra reply
Correction input: 'actually the answer is X because Y'
Feedback persisted locally + best-effort to zyra_feedback table
buildCorrectionContext() helper for future-prompt context injection
Corrections auto-injected into Zyra system prompt on every reply
Admin-curated knowledge base (market facts, pricing rules, margins)
Per-user knowledge (Zyra remembers what each user traded / asked)
Escalation flow: Zyra says 'I don't know — routing to Muzammil' + WhatsApp ping

systems.name: Zyra — WhatsApp Channel
systems.description: Zyra chats with registered users over WhatsApp via Twilio + whatsapp-webhook edge function. Real 2-way conversations, not templated drips.

features.name: Per-contact conversation memory (zyra remembers last 20 messages)

systems.name: Zyra — Trade Prescriptions Engine
systems.description: Not 'here's the data' — 'BUY Nonpareil 23/25 now because supply-shortage signal, India Diwali demand + Middle East Ramadan'. Directive + reasoning + confidence.

features.name: Monthly Market Brief — bullish/bearish call with reasoning
Trade signal cards on /intelligence (action + direction + confidence)
Per-user prescriptions (match to user's role / geography / volume)
Push notification when a new prescription fires
Back-testing framework: did our last 10 signals pay off?
Hyper-personalized: 'Bangladesh buyer, supply shortage incoming, buy now'

systems.name: Auth & Registration
systems.description: 4 login methods live, 65 V1 users migrated, admin controls built. Scope expanded 2026-04-24: V1 returning-user popup flow — when a V1 user logs in for the first time on V2, they get a modal to verify WhatsApp (OTP) and set a new password, converting them from V1 → full V2 user.

features.name: V1 auto-migration in whatsapp-login edge function
SetPassword page for V1 migrated users
Admin Add/Delete + Change Password in Settings
V1 returning-user popup: detect + OTP verify + set new password (F1a)
V1 user end-to-end OTP login verification (live test)

systems.name: CRM & Deal Pipeline
systems.description: CRM with pipeline, contacts, activities, users directory, bulk WhatsApp invite, offer builder. Scope expanded 2026-04-24: bulk WhatsApp invite tab added; per-team-member user-level profitability insights pending.

features.name: Tabs: pipeline / contacts / activity / users / invite
Bulk WhatsApp invite — paste numbers + persona type + track (C5b)
Registered Users tab shows 65 V1 migrated + new registrants
Users tab: tier filter chips work + counts per tier + V1-migrated badge (C5a)
Users tab: Verify action for admin/team — sets access_tier='verified' + metadata (C5d)
Dual-channel bulk invite: WhatsApp + Email (email queued, SMTP F1b pending)
Reconcile invited → joined when recipient registers (C5b-followup)
Per-team-member user-level insights for profitability targeting (C5c)
Widget filters + compare (stage vs stage, period vs period)

systems.description: Universal rule: every widget on every tab needs intelligent filters + user-input compare. /analysis + FilterBar shared kit + 6 pages retrofitted (Destinations, Forecasts, Pricing, News, CRM, Reports).

features.name: Retrofit Reports (crop-year compare panel with chip bar)

systems.name: BRM (Broker Relationship Management)
systems.description: /brokers route shipped 2026-04-24 with market-signal intelligence (focus/hold/avoid per market based on YoY flow). Internal team sees all brokers; broker portal shell + broker-owned offer management is Phase 9.

features.name: Market-signal engine (focus/hold/avoid per country based on YoY)
Info-walls note + projectArrayForRole applied to queries
MAXONS Needs + Margin Targets surface (internal only)
Broker offer-management surface (post inventory into Cropsintel)
Broker-scoped crm_contacts queries (broker sees only own row)
Dedicated broker portal shell (today renders inside MAXONS app)

systems.name: SRM (Supplier Relationship Management)
systems.description: /suppliers route shipped 2026-04-24. County-level analysis tool with 11 CA counties + San Joaquin/Sacramento region presets + variety mix pie + anonymized demand signals. Info walls active via projectArrayForRole.

features.name: County selector (11 CA counties + region presets)
Variety mix pie chart from abc_crop_receipts
Info walls: projectArrayForRole applied on every fetch
Real Land IQ county data (replaces modeled shares) — Phase 8
Dedicated supplier portal shell (today in MAXONS app)

systems.name: Information Walls (DB + API + Portal)
systems.description: THE business model. 3 layers: Postgres RLS, API projection middleware, portal routing. Scaffolding shipped 2026-04-24; Phase 8 wires it to every counterparty query.

features.name: supabase/schema_info_walls.sql — RLS policies on crm_contacts, crm_deals, user_profiles + user_family() fn
Wire auditAccess() into every CRM read/write action
Apply projectArrayForRole() to crm_contacts / crm_deals fetches on Contacts + Users + Invite tabs
Drop legacy permissive policies on crm_* tables (run script)
API response filter middleware (edge function layer)
Portal-scoped routing: role determines which portal shell renders

systems.name: Commodity-Agnostic Schema
systems.description: Platform supports N commodities from day one. src/lib/commodity.js is the ONE switch point; supabase/schema_commodity.sql adds commodities + products tables; docs/COMMODITY_AGNOSTIC.md is the architecture reference. Migration of abc_* tables to commodity_id is Phase 8.

features.name: src/lib/commodity.js — runtime abstraction with almond/pistachio/pineapple registry
supabase/schema_commodity.sql — commodities + products tables + RLS + seed rows
Migrate abc_*_reports tables to reference commodity_id (Phase 8)
Replace hardcoded 'almond' literals in UI copy (Phase 7b)
Commodity selector in sidebar (defaults to almond)
Activate pistachio scraper when first data lands

systems.name: Multi-Portal Frontend
systems.description: Role-scoped portal shells: customer / supplier / broker / logistics / internal team. Login determines which portal renders. Same platform spine, different views.

systems.name: Trade Lifecycle (Offer → Contract → Fulfillment)
systems.description: End-to-end execution layer. Offer → margin engine → customer view → request to buy → sales verification → WhatsApp contract + e-sign → fulfillment tracking. Zyra orchestrates.

features.name: Offer builder with variety/grade/form/incoterm (existing in Trading Portal)
CRM deal pipeline with stage progression
Margin engine (applies MAXONS rules before customer display)
Source-hiding layer (customer never sees supplier identity)
Contract generation via WhatsApp link + interactive e-sign

systems.name: ADELA — Nervous System / AI Orchestrator
systems.description: Runtime orchestrator shipped as src/lib/adela.js. Router abstraction routes each job-type to Claude/GPT/Gemini/Council per JOB_ROUTES table. Info-wall filter on every AI response. Audit log on every call. Phase 8 wires OpenAI + Gemini edge functions.

features.name: Zyra chat uses Claude for all conversations
src/lib/adela.js router: routeAIJob(), askZyra(), analyzeMarket(), monthlyBrief(), atlasDebate()
JOB_ROUTES table: zyra_chat→claude, multilingual→openai, multimodal→gemini, atlas_debate→council
Info-wall filter on AI response (family-aware redaction)
Audit log on every AI call
Existing Zyra callers migrate to routeAIJob()

systems.name: Monitor Bot — Background Self-Audit
systems.description: User ask 2026-04-24: 'multi-brain AI that navigates like human, reports errors, Claude fixes, keeps app stable.' Shipped lean MVP tonight — scripts/monitor-agent.js walks public routes, scans for error signals, writes public/monitor-log.json. /map reads + renders findings. Full auto-fix loop is Phase 10 (ATLAS) — gated on founder WhatsApp+OTP per vision.

features.name: 14 routes covered (all public + login + register + map)
8 heuristic signals (NaN, TypeError, [object Object], cropsintel.net leak, empty states…)
/map panel renders latest Monitor Bot run
Wire to GitHub Actions workflow (needs workflow-scope token)
Authenticated Playwright walker (bypasses SPA hydration limit)
Multi-model AI council scoring of each finding (Phase 10)
Auto-propose PR fixes gated on founder WhatsApp+OTP (Phase 10)

systems.name: ATLAS — Self-Developing Brain
systems.description: Reads own plan, AI council debates, proposes changes, verifies, admin approves (WhatsApp video + OTP), ships. Self-monitoring + self-healing. Founder-only admin gate.

features.name: AI council debate: Claude + GPT + Gemini on each change
Admin gate: WhatsApp video + OTP authentication
Self-monitoring: catches errors, proposes fixes, feeds back

widgetWorkshop.note: User re-flagged 2026-04-24 12:45Z: 'we were designing the app to have the clean widget library and workshop.. do we still have that in plan??' Honest answer: YES in plan, NO shipped yet. V1 had full spec + working impl (docs in ../Cropsintel/feature5_widget_workshop_prompt.md + widget_workshop_fix_prompt.md). V2 has only the Card primitive (shipped this pass) as the visual foundation.

v1Spec.layout: 3-column: widget picker | Before↔After preview | Zyra chat+voice
v1Spec.actions: Revert, Save Draft, Publish, Version History
v1Spec.dataModel: widget_configs table (widget_key, version, config jsonb, status draft/published, parent_version_id for branching)
v1Spec.hook: useWidgetConfig(widgetKey) merges published config over hardcoded defaults
v1Spec.dataGapDetection: Unknown field → auto-insert into data_gaps table + non-blocking toast
v1Spec.atlasReingest: On publish, call atlas-reingest-widget edge fn

v2Status.cardPrimitive: ✅ landed 2026-04-24 (commit 453128a) — foundation for premium widget look

widgetWorkshop.sequencing: Post-launch feature. Pre-launch we ship the Card primitive (done) + sidebar reorg (done) + premium polish on core pages (in flight). Post-launch: widget_configs migration → useWidgetConfig hook → /admin/widget-workshop route + split view → Zyra tool-use extension → progressive widget retrofit (dashboard first, then destinations/supply/pricing).
widgetWorkshop.priority: high post-launch — makes every future widget change self-serve for the user via Zyra voice/chat instead of requiring a code push
widgetWorkshop.rescopedAs: Listed in priorityQueue as rank 6, blocked on launch-focus items 1-5 above

abc_position_reports.note: Sidebar claim corrected from 116 → 106 position reports. Gaps queued as abc-position-month-gaps.
